transcript:
HCP: referral to Orthopaedics
HCP: patient is James Chen, 45 years old
HCP: he complains of persistent right knee pain
HCP: pain started after a gardening accident two weeks ago
HCP: history of previous meniscus repair in 2018
HCP: taking ibuprofen 400mg three times daily for relief
HCP: no known allergies
HCP: please assess and refer for MRI
